mapper.select: /* adm-role-ownerbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstOw */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.CTKEY , A.CTNM , B.OWKEY , B.OWNM , #{rokey} AS ROKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_CT A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CTXOW C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_OW B ON B.OWKEY = C.OWKEY WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TADMIN_MST_ROXCTGT WHERE CTKEY = A.CTKEY AND ROKEY = #{rokey} )

/* adm-role-ownerbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectOwnerByRole */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , B.CTKEY , C.CTNM , A.OWKEY , A.OWNM , B.ROKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_OW A INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_ROXOWGT B ON A.OWKEY = B.OWKEY INNER JOIN TADMIN_MST_CT C ON B.CTKEY = C.CTKEY WHERE B.ROKEY = #{rokey}
/* adm-role-ownerbyrole-sql-oracle.xml - selectTAdminMstRoxowgt */ SELECT '0' AS CHK , CTKEY ,OWKEY ,ROKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_ROXOWGT WHERE ROKEY = #{rokey}
